name: Cat-Cow
instructions: Start on all fours, hands under shoulders and knees under hips.
Breathe out and gently round your spine, tucking your chin (cat).
Breathe in and slowly let your belly drop, lifting your chest and gaze (cow).
Move smoothly within a comfortable, pain-free range.
cue: Move slowly with your breath — no forcing the end range.
demoSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 120 80" width="120" height="80" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 55 Q60 30 100 55"/><line x1="28" y1="55" x2="28" y2="72"/><line x1="92" y1="55" x2="92" y2="72"/><line x1="100" y1="55" x2="108" y2="45"/></svg>

name: Bird-Dog
instructions: On all fours, brace your core gently and keep your back flat.
Reach one arm forward and the opposite leg straight back.
Keep your hips level — don’t let them twist or sag.
Lower with control and switch sides.
cue: Keep your spine still — move only the limbs.
demoSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 120 80" width="120" height="80" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="35" y1="45" x2="85" y2="45"/><line x1="35" y1="45" x2="35" y2="65"/><line x1="85" y1="45" x2="85" y2="65"/><line x1="35" y1="45" x2="12" y2="32"/><line x1="85" y1="45" x2="108" y2="58"/><circle cx="30" cy="40" r="5"/></svg>

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back, knees bent, feet flat and hip-width apart.
Tighten your glutes and press through your heels to lift your hips.
Raise until your body forms a straight line from knees to shoulders.
Lower slowly without arching your lower back.
cue: Drive through the heels and squeeze the glutes, not the back.
demoSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 120 80" width="120" height="80" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 62 L48 40 L70 62"/><line x1="70" y1="62" x2="100" y2="62"/><circle cx="104" cy="58" r="5"/><line x1="18" y1="62" x2="18" y2="72"/></svg>

name: McGill Curl-up
instructions: Lie on your back with one knee bent, the other leg straight.
Place your hands under your lower back to keep its natural curve.
Lift your head and shoulders just a little off the floor.
Hold briefly, then lower with control. Don’t flatten your back.
cue: Tiny lift — chin neutral, no crunching the neck.
demoSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 120 80" width="120" height="80" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="20" y1="62" x2="100" y2="62"/><circle cx="32" cy="52" r="5"/><path d="M37 55 L60 58 L72 44 L84 58"/></svg>

name: Side Plank
instructions: Lie on your side, forearm under your shoulder, knees bent.
Lift your hips so your body forms a straight line.
Keep your neck long and breathe steadily through the hold.
Start from the knees and progress slowly as you get stronger.
cue: Stack the shoulder over the elbow; keep hips lifted and level.
demoSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 120 80" width="120" height="80" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="22" y1="62" x2="100" y2="40"/><line x1="30" y1="60" x2="30" y2="72"/><circle cx="104" cy="36" r="5"/></svg>

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on your back, arms reaching up, knees bent over your hips.
Gently flatten your lower back toward the floor and brace.
Slowly lower one arm and the opposite leg toward the floor.
Return with control and alternate sides, keeping your back steady.
cue: Keep the lower back quiet — move only as far as you can control.
demoSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 120 80" width="120" height="80" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="20" y1="58" x2="100" y2="58"/><circle cx="28" cy="52" r="5"/><line x1="50" y1="58" x2="58" y2="38"/><line x1="50" y1="58" x2="42" y2="38"/><line x1="74" y1="58" x2="82" y2="40"/><line x1="74" y1="58" x2="66" y2="40"/></svg>
